name: Eligible Free Rate Definition
explanation: Eligible free rate for K-12 students is computed as Free Meal Count (K-12) divided by Enrollment (K-12) from the frpm table. Use a real-number division and guard against zero enrollment when writing SQL.

name: Charter School Definition
explanation: Charter schools are identified by the frpm table column Charter School (Y/N) equal to 1. When location attributes such as zip code are needed, join frpm to schools on CDSCode and read the location fields from schools.
